scripts.check:js: node --check public/app.js && node --check public/calendar.js && node --check public/tauri-bridge.js && node --check scripts/prepare-frontend.mjs && node --check scripts/prepare-frontend.test.mjs && node --check scripts/security-config.test.mjs && node --check scripts/tauri-e2e-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/electron-transfer-exporter-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:frontend: node scripts/prepare-frontend.mjs && node scripts/prepare-frontend.test.mjs && node scripts/security-config.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check:js && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:rust
scripts.ci: npm run check:format && npm test && npm run check:clippy && npm run build
